title: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life
display_title: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life
wikitext:
[]: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by VUX » Tue Jan 16, 2018 5:25 pm I was wondering how the story would be effected if there was a third Seed of Life other than Adam and Lilith ?

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by StrokeMeGoat » Wed Jan 17, 2018 12:27 pm Do you mean a third seed present on Earth? Info from some of the games officially recognized as canon state the FAR created 7 seeds of life. IIRC, four with the fruit of life, and three with the fruit of knowledge.

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by VUX » Wed Jan 17, 2018 1:41 pm Why were more made with the fruit of life instead of the fruit of knowledge?

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 18, 2018 12:23 am Knowledge is more dangerous.

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by VUX » Thu Jan 18, 2018 12:29 am But why, because I thought that the fruit of life made the angels immortal

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by ElKaizerX » Thu Jan 18, 2018 2:35 am Immortal yes, but the show made the clear argument that the children of the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil had the ability to be far more powerful.

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Jan 18, 2018 12:19 pm Imagine the immense chaos if all seven landed on Earth

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by VUX » Thu Jan 18, 2018 1:35 pm Would they work together or fight each other?

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by Lt Light Ark » Thu Mar 01, 2018 12:31 pm The greatest question regarding those seeds is, if the creatures of the Tree Of Knowledge are far superior and more variable (so good), why did the FAR created the creatures from the Tree of Life?

[]: Re: What if there was a 3rd Seed of Life?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 01, 2018 2:27 pm StrokeMeGoat wrote: Info from some of the games officially recognized as canon state the FAR created 7 seeds of life. IIRC, four with the fruit of life, and three with the fruit of knowledge.
